description: Ingest an external PR review into local review artifacts and apply the normal review disposition flow

content: Please read AGENTS.md and follow its instructions. First read `codeInfoStatus/flow-state/current-plan.json` and use only the stored `plan_path` and `additional_repositories` as the active scope for this flow. If the file contains only the legacy shape `{ "plan_path": "..." }`, treat that as an empty `additional_repositories` list. Verify that the selected plan file exists in the current repository, that the story number in the current repository branch name matches the story number in the selected plan filename, and that every additional repository still matches the same story branch. If those do not match, stop and say the current-plan handoff is stale and must be regenerated. Then derive the external review input path from the selected plan story number using `codeInfoStatus/reviews/<story-number>-external-review-input.md`. Do not discover external review comments anywhere else and do not use timestamps or latest-file discovery. Verify that this external review input file exists. If it does not exist, stop and say the external review input file is missing and must be created before this flow can continue. Confirm the selected story, the exact external review input file path, and that this flow will treat that markdown file as the sole source of external review comments for artifact generation.
If possible, git push the story branch in the current repository and in every repository listed in `additional_repositories`.
